calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim;
Off Calendar Oct-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. People of the State of California's Motion for order for terminating sanctions and striking claim granted, the claim of Michael Miranda shall be stricken. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Dec-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Pamela Underwood, Assitant Disctrict Attorney, for petitioner and moving party: People of the State of California
No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Petitioner People of the State of California's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Claimant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections and produce documents within 21 days of notice of this order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
